sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
sections.passage_or_context:
Notes on course available
Number of language courses per week 10
Languages
• Modern European Languages: French, Spanish, German, Dutch, Polish
• Ancient Languages: Latin and (1) {{BLANK}}

sections.instruction: Complete the summary of the welcoming speech. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
sections.passage_or_context:
Dear Joe,
You missed the welcome meeting. We were greeted by the Principal of Donleavy (11) {{BLANK}} who explained how the university has (12) {{BLANK}} campuses. He told us where all the important buildings on this campus are and also explained which subjects are studied on the other two. The Principal’s (13) {{BLANK}} is on our campus.
We must carry our (14) {{BLANK}} to get into the campus. The university shop sells (15) {{BLANK}} and {{BLANK}} and is next to the cafeteria.
You need to use your (16) {{BLANK}} when you buy things in both of them. There will be a lot of building work because they are building a (17) {{BLANK}} during this term.
Regards,
Rebecca

questions.content:
Dear Joe,
You missed the welcome meeting. We were greeted by the Principal of Donleavy {{BLANK}} who explained how the university has {{BLANK}} campuses. He told us where all the important buildings on this campus are and also explained which subjects are studied on the other two. The Principal’s {{BLANK}} is on our campus.
We must carry our {{BLANK}} to get into the campus. The university shop sells {{BLANK}} and {{BLANK}} and is next to the cafeteria.
You need to use your {{BLANK}} when you buy things in both of them. There will be a lot of building work because they are building a {{BLANK}} during this term.

sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: Bill was ill. What was wrong?
options: C severe pain in his head
B have never worked on a project together
C have plans for later that evening
A research and write a survey questionnaire
C submit their project via the internet

questions.content: What does Sarah want Bill to do?
options: B write a list of questions

questions.content: Which of the following items will be included in Bill and Sarah’s research?
With what aspect of the project does Bill express concern?
What does Bill plan to do for the rest of the day?
options: A review the previous week’s classes
B prepare notes for his next meeting with Sarah
C find people to participate in the research

questions.content: What does Sarah do for Bill?
options: A helps him catch up on the notes
B gives him a copy of her notes
C promises to help him study

questions.content: What does Sarah have to do at the library?
Where do Bill and Sarah agree to meet the next day?

sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: Why did the speaker choose to speak about Joan Miro?
options: A because a new work by Miro was recently added to the gallery
B because he thought Miro would appeal to people with different tastes
C because he felt everyone would be familiar with Miro’s art

questions.content: Which THREE features below are mentioned by the speaker as characteristics of Joan Miro’s art? Choose THREE from A-G.
options: B the use of primary colors
F equal number of sculptures and paintings
